content:
not being emotional btw just entirely shocked at your take

i did read the conversation, and it’s relevant to him because of the rewards, not the game mode itself, just check the leaderboards rewards and also the 5/5 win rewards lol 

maybe it’s because you’re new like you said but ranking rewards are indeed competitive and players grind for it. take for example the old pdive system where there were daily rewards for leaderboard rankings. it was such a cancer grinding every day for as high points as possible 

perhaps it’s not rational to you, but there are players who take very seriously the direction of where the game going. things like the AA system, traphase rewards are a sensitive concern. And them choosing how to spend their money is honestly not your place to police it nor give it names like erratic nor irrational. 

generally threads in this q/a should be kept relevant about the topic and not be cluttered. from what i can see you keep trying to nick pick unnecessarily, if u wanna do that then take it to dm honestly, it doesn’t help this thread at all and the devs / staff just have to put in more work to go through the actual questions about changes / improvement
thread_title: Can we change PvP seasonal rewards condition to *participate* instead?

content:
You don't want to keep arguing, sorry if this whole conversation made you frustrated. Agree with some of your points, like new players needing Silver and Cores for Traphase and I got the feeling that you agree with some of mine. But still some points that I just can't see any conclusion nearby, like comparing Traphase with Arc 2 game modes doesn't make sense at all.

I just want to say a few final things that are probably relevant and the reason you're looking at so many Traphase posts. Every update, the game mode feels more pushed for many players that don't actually like it. First we got a Traphase event with good rewards, then challenges giving a lot of silver and endgame materials. Now we just got the same Traphase event again, followed by an update giving time gated pulls and even more end game materials.

I don't want Traphase deleted, let player have fun IMO. But current message that I'm getting from Traphase players is: Traphase has rewards, deal with it. It seems that they don't care that people don't like the mode, or PvP in general. Because of that I'm really tempted to start supporting the other extreme side that just says: delete Traphase and the game will be better.
thread_title: Can we change PvP seasonal rewards condition to *participate* instead?
